title: agropyron cristatum subsp. mongolicum
intro: Agropyron cristatum subsp. mongolicum, also known as Mongolian wheat grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the steppes of Mongolia and China. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Mongolian wheat grass include reducing stress, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. The plant can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as tea, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
